description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:alpine Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single build job (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, executes the shell commands: apk update, apk upgrade, apk add zip, yarn, npm run bundle, cd chromeExtension, and zip -9 -r ../chromeExtension.zip . -x *.map. The job should archive the resulting chromeExtension.zip as an artifact. No additional services or deployment targets are required.
